ucs.title: [LLM] Cleaver / TG-2889 'Net Crawler' propagation: PsExec → LSASS credential dumper chain
ucs.description: Hunts the signature Cleaver/Operation Cleaver lateral-movement + credential-theft chain implemented in their 'Net Crawler' tool — PsExec/PAExec used to land on a host, immediately followed by Mimikatz, Windows Credential Editor (wce.exe), Cain, ProcDump-on-lsass, or PwDump execution. Cleaver was repeatedly observed pairing PsExec with WCE/Mimikatz to harvest creds across Iranian-targeted victims (oil/gas, energy, transport, defence).
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("psexec.exe","psexesvc.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","remcom.exe") OR Processes.parent_process_name="services.exe" Processes.parent_process IN ("*PSEXESVC*","*PAExec*","*RemComSvc*")) AND (Processes.process_name IN ("mimikatz.exe","wce.exe","cain.exe","procdump.exe","pwdump.exe","pwdump7.exe","fgdump.exe","gsecdump.exe") OR Processes.process_command_line IN ("*sekurlsa*","*lsadump*","*-ma lsass*","*-w -l -v*","*privilege::debug*","*-pwd -registry*")) AND NOT Processes.user IN ("*$","SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE") by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.parent_process Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_id Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Cleaver / TG-2889 Net Crawler chain — PsExec parentage + LSASS-touching credential dumper child
let _psexec_parents = dynamic(["psexec.exe","psexesvc.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","remcom.exe","remcomsvc.exe"]);
let _cred_dumpers   = dynamic(["mimikatz.exe","wce.exe","cain.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","pwdump.exe","pwdump7.exe","fgdump.exe","gsecdump.exe"]);
let _cred_cmd_tokens = dynamic(["sekurlsa","lsadump","privilege::debug","-ma lsass","-w -l -v","-pwd -registry","logonpasswords"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_psexec_parents)
   or InitiatingProcessParentFileName in~ (_psexec_parents)
   or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "services.exe"
       and InitiatingProcessCommandLine has_any ("PSEXESVC","PAExec","RemComSvc"))
| where FileName in~ (_cred_dumpers)
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any (_cred_cmd_tokens)
   or (FileName =~ "rundll32.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "comsvcs.dll" and ProcessCommandLine has "MiniDump")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          GrandParent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
          Child = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          ChildSHA256 = SHA256,
          IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cleaver / TG-2889 Net Crawler chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent (4688)
let _psexec_parents = dynamic(["psexec.exe","psexesvc.exe","paexec.exe","csexec.exe","remcom.exe","remcomsvc.exe"]);
let _cred_dumpers   = dynamic(["mimikatz.exe","wce.exe","cain.exe","procdump.exe","procdump64.exe","pwdump.exe","pwdump7.exe","fgdump.exe","gsecdump.exe"]);
let _cred_cmd_tokens = dynamic(["sekurlsa","lsadump","privilege::debug","-ma lsass","-w -l -v","-pwd -registry","logonpasswords"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, @"\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,  @"\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (_psexec_parents)
   or (ParentLeaf == "services.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("PSEXESVC","PAExec","RemComSvc"))
| where ChildLeaf in (_cred_dumpers)
   or CommandLine has_any (_cred_cmd_tokens)
   or (ChildLeaf == "rundll32.exe" and CommandLine has "comsvcs.dll" and CommandLine has "MiniDump")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, SubjectUserName,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          TokenElevationType, NewProcessId
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cleaver Net Crawler - PsExec spawns LSASS credential dumper
id: f4c3e0a1-7d2c-4d6b-9bce-cl3av3rnetcrwl
status: experimental
description: Detects the Cleaver / TG-2889 'Net Crawler' lateral-movement + credential-theft chain - PsExec/PAExec/RemCom spawning Mimikatz, Windows Credential Editor (WCE), Cain, ProcDump (against lsass), or PwDump.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0003/
  - https://www.cylance.com/operation-cleaver
  - https://www.secureworks.com/research/threat-group-2889
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.t1588.002
  - attack.lateral_movement
  - attack.t1021.002
  - attack.g0003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_psexec:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\psexec.exe'
      - '\psexesvc.exe'
      - '\paexec.exe'
      - '\csexec.exe'
      - '\remcom.exe'
      - '\remcomsvc.exe'
  child_dumper_image:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\mimikatz.exe'
      - '\wce.exe'
      - '\cain.exe'
      - '\procdump.exe'
      - '\procdump64.exe'
      - '\pwdump.exe'
      - '\pwdump7.exe'
      - '\fgdump.exe'
      - '\gsecdump.exe'
  child_dumper_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'sekurlsa'
      - 'lsadump'
      - 'privilege::debug'
      - '-ma lsass'
      - '-w -l -v'
      - '-pwd -registry'
      - 'logonpasswords'
  comsvcs_minidump:
    Image|endswith: '\rundll32.exe'
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'comsvcs.dll'
      - 'MiniDump'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: parent_psexec and (child_dumper_image or child_dumper_cmd or comsvcs_minidump) and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Authorised red-team / IR engagements using PsExec + Mimikatz from a known jump host
  - Microsoft support cases requiring ProcDump on lsass for memory diagnostics
level: high
ucs.rationale: Operation Cleaver's 'Net Crawler' is documented (Cylance 2014, SecureWorks TG-2889) as a worm-style propagator that pushes itself via PsExec to internal hosts and immediately invokes Mimikatz and Windows Credential Editor (wce.exe) to harvest creds — WCE in particular is a Cleaver hallmark, less commonly seen in modern crews who default to Mimikatz alone. Pairing PsExec parentage with the dumper c

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?

_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID

ucs.title: [LLM] Cleaver tooling artefacts: Jasus ARP poisoner, TinyZBot, and WCE on-disk drops
ucs.description: Hunts on-disk presence and execution of Cleaver's known custom & repurposed toolset — Jasus (their bespoke ARP cache poisoner used for AiTM credential harvest, T1557.002), TinyZBot (custom backdoor), Windows Credential Editor (wce.exe), Cain & Abel, and the Net Crawler binary. These names/paths are public IOCs from the Cylance Operation Cleaver report and SecureWorks TG-2889 reporting.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name IN ("jasus.exe","tinyzbot.exe","wce.exe","cain.exe","netc.exe","netcrawler.exe","smartftp.exe") OR Processes.process_command_line IN ("*jasus*","*-arp*spoof*","*ZhoperCmd*","*tinyzbot*") OR Processes.process_hash IN ("c0f23c4426cf2c632e6cae08b2c9bd1f","a787c0e42608f9a69f718f6dca5556cc","bd5d1366d8e4bc97c4a3e2dbb22e4b09") by host Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.process Processes.process_path Processes.process_hash | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
// Cleaver / Operation Cleaver tooling — known binaries on disk or in execution
let _cleaver_binaries = dynamic([
    "jasus.exe",          // ARP poisoner - Cleaver custom
    "tinyzbot.exe",       // TinyZBot backdoor - Cleaver custom
    "wce.exe",            // Windows Credential Editor - Cleaver favourite
    "cain.exe",           // Cain & Abel - paired with Jasus for AiTM
    "netc.exe",
    "netcrawler.exe",     // Net Crawler propagator
    "smartftp.exe"        // exfil tooling abused by Cleaver
]);
let _cleaver_cmd_markers = dynamic([
    "jasus", "ZhoperCmd", "tinyzbot", "-arp -spoof", "net crawler"
]);
// Branch A — process execution
let _proc = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ (_cleaver_binaries)
       or ProcessCommandLine has_any (_cleaver_cmd_markers)
       or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_cleaver_binaries)
    | extend Source = "ProcessExec"
    | project Timestamp, Source, DeviceName, AccountName,
              FileName, FolderPath, SHA256, ProcessCommandLine,
              ParentFile = InitiatingProcessFileName;
// Branch B — file write to disk (catches drop before first run)
let _files = DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(30d)
    | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileRenamed","FileModified")
    | where FileName in~ (_cleaver_binaries)
    | extend Source = "FileWrite"
    | project Timestamp, Source, DeviceName,
              AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName,
              FileName, FolderPath, SHA256,
              ProcessCommandLine = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              ParentFile = InitiatingProcessFileName;
union _proc, _files
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Cleaver / Operation Cleaver tooling — Sentinel
let _cleaver_binaries = dynamic(["jasus.exe","tinyzbot.exe","wce.exe","cain.exe","netc.exe","netcrawler.exe","smartftp.exe"]);
let _cleaver_cmd_markers = dynamic(["jasus","ZhoperCmd","tinyzbot","-arp -spoof","net crawler"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    @"\\")[-1])),
         ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, @"\\")[-1]))
| where ChildLeaf in (_cleaver_binaries)
   or ParentLeaf in (_cleaver_binaries)
   or CommandLine has_any (_cleaver_cmd_markers)
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Cleaver Operation Toolset Execution
id: a91e5d2c-1f0b-4e8a-b3c4-cl3av3rt00ls01
status: experimental
description: Detects execution of Cleaver / TG-2889 / Operation Cleaver custom and repurposed tooling - Jasus ARP poisoner, TinyZBot backdoor, Windows Credential Editor (WCE), Cain, and Net Crawler.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0003/
  - https://www.cylance.com/operation-cleaver
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/03
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1003.001
  - attack.t1557.002
  - attack.t1588.002
  - attack.t1587.001
  - attack.g0003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  cleaver_image:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\jasus.exe'
      - '\tinyzbot.exe'
      - '\wce.exe'
      - '\cain.exe'
      - '\netc.exe'
      - '\netcrawler.exe'
  cleaver_parent:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\jasus.exe'
      - '\tinyzbot.exe'
      - '\netcrawler.exe'
  cleaver_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'ZhoperCmd'
      - 'tinyzbot'
      - '-arp -spoof'
      - 'net crawler'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (cleaver_image or cleaver_parent or cleaver_cmd) and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Network engineers running ARP-spoof tooling for documented penetration tests (rare)
  - Legacy security software with overlapping filenames (verify via hash/path)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Cleaver invested heavily in custom tooling (TinyZBot, Jasus, Net Crawler) — these binary names are not generic and don't naturally appear on enterprise hosts. Jasus in particular implements ARP cache poisoning (T1557.002) for in-LAN credential harvesting, an unusual technique outside Iranian intrusion sets. WCE (Windows Credential Editor) is documented by Cylance and SecureWorks as Cleaver's prefe
_sigma_issues: sigma parse error: Sigma rule identifier must be an UUID
